name: Piccalilli
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Red Peppers, seeded and chopped
2 medium Green Peppers, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed and chop the red and green peppers.
2. Shred the cabbage.
3. Combine all vegetables with salt and let stand overnight.
4. In the morning, drain the vegetables, pressing out the juice.
5. Add vinegar, sugar, and spices (tied in a bag) to the vegetable mixture; bring to a boil.
6. Simmer until the vegetables are clear and the syrup is thickened.
7. Discard the spice bag and seal the piccalilli in hot jars.
Makes 8 Pints.
Note: One tablespoon each peppercorns and celery seeds may be substituted for the cinnamon.
